description.from: World-class art museum with Canadian and international collections. Indoor cultural experience in Frank Gehry-designed building. Quiet and contemplative atmosphere.
description.to: Natural history and world cultures museum with extensive dinosaur and artifact collections. Indoor exhibits span palaeontology, biodiversity, and global cultures, offering hands-on and family-friendly galleries.
